parameters.jsCode:
const data = $('📊 Parse + Sort + Build Digest').item.json.all_scored || [];
return data.map(d => ({ json: d }));

value.user_message:
=You are an affiliate marketing strategist for a how-to blog. Evaluate these programs and generate application pitches.

BLOG NICHES: {{ $('⚙️ Load Config').item.json.NICHES 

 'make money online, SaaS tools, health wellness, finance, productivity' }}

PROGRAMS:
{{ $json.all_products.slice(0,25).map((p,i) => i+1+'. '+p.name+' '+p.platform+' Commission: '+p.commission+'% Niche: '+p.niche).join('
') }}

For each program return JSON array:
{
  "name": "program name",
  "ai_score": 1-10,
  "relevance": "why it fits the blog",
  "pitch": "3-sentence application pitch: 1) About my blog 2) My audience 3) Why I want to promote this product"
}

Return ONLY a JSON array.
